label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Company Allowing Indistinguishable Name)
rationale: Top-of-form: the consenting LLC's Maine-registered name (domestic-entity convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...consents to the use of the following indistinguishable name
rationale: The specific name being granted for use by the requestor.
Name of the entity receiving the right to use the indistinguishable name.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The entity in possession of the name must change its name to
rationale: New (distinguishable) name the consenting LLC undertakes to adopt. Form-scoped under name_consent.* alongside indistinguishable_name and requestor.name. When MLLC-15 is bundled with MLLC-9, synth copies this value into the bundled form's amendment.new_name. Must include a valid LLC suffix per §1508.
Date of execution (top-right of signature row).
First authorized signer (Shape D — combined name+capacity, paired with a wet-ink signature line that has no AcroForm widget). Statute requires at least one; this slot is required.
Second authorized signer (Shape D). Statute (§1676.1B) only mandates one signer; this second slot is optional and used when the LLC's operating agreement calls for dual authorization.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (commonly used when the bundled name-change form is also listed here).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Base fee $35 (per page-0 header) plus expedite premium and any fee from the bundled name-change form.
